text: Commit accepted candidates only through the public versioned LEDGER command contract.
target: INGEST reads discoverable LEDGER schemas, never opens private storage, supplies stable per-candidate idempotency identities, durably records each structured outcome, and returns a resumable receipt whose accepted transaction references round-trip from LEDGER. Evidence: analogous — FR-LEDGER-CONTRACT-DISCOVERY, FR-LEDGER-STRUCTURED-INVOCATION, FR-LEDGER-IDEMPOTENT-WRITES, and UC-INGEST-003.
